title: Making games in a war zone: Metro 2039’s Ukrainian developers speak out
description: Upcoming sequel wants to capture a "uniquely Ukrainian perspective" on the post-apocalypse.

title: New undersea cable cutter risks Internet’s backbone
description: China cable-cutter demo coincides with more sabotage of subsea Internet cables.

title: The UK Launches Its $675 Million Sovereign AI Fund
description: In a bid to minimize dependence on technology from other countries, the UK government is plowing resources into homegrown AI startups.

title: Microsoft and Stellantis want to use AI to help car owners
description: Digital services for brands from Jeep to Peugeot will feel the presence of AI.

title: Google now lets you explore the web side-by-side with AI Mode
description: Now, when you're using AI Mode on Chrome desktop, clicking a link will open the webpage side-by-side with AI Mode.

title: Google's AI Mode Update Tries to Kill Tab Hopping in Chrome
description: Google latest update to AI Mode in its Chrome browser is designed to keep the chatbot-style search tool always around once you start an online search journey.

title: Gemini can now create personalized AI images by digging around in Google Photos
description: Google is making it easier to feed your photos into Nano Banana for more personal image generation.

title: RFK Jr. forces FDA to reconsider 12 unproven peptides after 2023 ban
description: There doesn't seem to be new safety or efficacy data, but Kennedy touts them anyway.

title: InsightFinder raises $15M to help companies figure out where AI agents go wrong
description: According to CEO Helen Gu, the biggest problem facing the industry today is not just monitoring and diagnosing where AI models go wrong — it's also diagnosing how the entire tech stack operates now that AI is part of it.

title: AI traffic to US retailers rose 393% in Q1, and it’s boosting their revenue too
description: Adobe says AI traffic to U.S. retail sites also jumped 269% in March, with visitors converting better and generating more revenue than non-AI shoppers.

title: Roblox’s AI assistant gets new agentic tools to plan, build, and test games
description: The new tools are designed to help creators throughout the entire development process.

title: Google is now targeting bad ads over bad actors
description: Google blocked 8.3 billion ads in 2025 but suspended fewer advertisers.

title: Anthropic Plots Major London Expansion
description: As tensions with the US government mount, Anthropic has leased a new office with enough space to quadruple its 200-person head count in London.

title: Making AI operational in constrained public sector environments
description: The AI boom has hit across industries, and public sector organizations are facing pressure to accelerate adoption. title: Treating enterprise AI as an operating layer
description: There’s a fault line running through enterprise AI, and it’s not the one getting the most attention. title: Why having “humans in the loop” in an AI war is an illusion
description: The availability of artificial intelligence for use in warfare is at the center of a legal battle between Anthropic and the Pentagon. title: This Beanie Is Designed to Read Your Thoughts
description: California-based startup Sabi is developing a thought-to-text wearable that could usher in the cyborg future.

title: The noise we make is hurting animals. Can we learn to shut up?
description: When the covid-19 pandemic started, Jennifer Phillips thought about the songs of the sparrows. They were easier to hear, because the world had suddenly become quieter. title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
description: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
